title: Enhanced Boss Bars
body:
![IMPORTANT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ecae43de7593f7aa392cd442fb0187be5531c65.png) Hey! I made a mod with this resource pack to resolve boss mod compatibility bugs (like Cataclysm or Aether) and some other bugs like the boss bar showing in chat instead of the boss name (which isn't a bug actually, it's because of how the resource pack works). The mod is now available [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-boss-bars-mod).

![Enhanced Boss Bars](https://i.imgur.com/aMFJ8ri.png) Enhanced Boss Bars is a project that aims to improve all the boss bars so that there is a better immersion in the amazing world of minecraft, since the default bars are very uncreative. If you have any suggestions for a mod boss, please comment on the CurseForge page and I'll put it on the mod list :) I hope you enjoy it and thank you very much for watching.

Bedrock version here

[![AD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b773e04603f58f6d178cfe7a7bbb7e828573ebeb.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/EnhancedBossBars) ## Mod List Some mods have created their owns boss bars, making them incompatible with this resource pack, therefore we have mods that work depending on the version. Choose yours:
1.20.1 and newer versions **Mowzie's Mobs** - ✅ Frostmaw - ❎ Ferrous Wroughtnaut (Incompatible) - ❎ Umvuthi (Incompatible) **Cracker's Witherstorm** - ✅ Wither Storm - ◻️ Withered Symbiont **Alex's Mobs** - ✅ Voidworm **Bosses of Mass Destruction** - ✅ Night Lich - ✅ Void Blossom - ✅ Obsidilith - ✅ Nether Gauntlet **Twilight Forest** - ✅ Alpha Yeti - ✅ Hydra - ✅ Naga - ✅ Snow Queen - ✅ Ur Ghast - ◻️ Twilight Lich **Incompatible mods** - L_Ender's Cataclysm - The Aether

1.19.2 **Mowzie's Mobs** - ✅ Frostmaw - ✅ Ferrous Wroughtnaut - ❎ Umvuthi (Incompatible) **Cracker's Witherstorm** - ✅ Wither Storm - ◻️ Withered Symbiont **Alex's Mobs** - ✅ Voidworm **Bosses of Mass Destruction** - ✅ Night Lich - ✅ Void Blossom - ✅ Obsidilith - ✅ Nether Gauntlet **Twilight Forest** - ✅ Alpha Yeti - ✅ Hydra - ✅ Naga - ✅ Snow Queen - ✅ Ur Ghast - ◻️ Twilight Lich **Incompatible mods** - L_Ender's Cataclysm - The Aether

1.16.5 **Mowzie's Mobs** - ✅ Frostmaw - ✅ Ferrous Wroughtnaut - ◻️ Barako **Cracker's Witherstorm** - ✅ Wither Storm - ◻️ Withered Symbiont **Alex's Mobs** - ✅ Voidworm **Bosses of Mass Destruction** - ✅ Night Lich - ✅ Void Blossom - ✅ Obsidilith - ✅ Nether Gauntlet **Twilight Forest** - ✅ Alpha Yeti - ✅ Hydra - ✅ Naga - ✅ Snow Queen - ✅ Ur Ghast - ◻️ Twilight Lich **L_Ender's Cataclysm** - ✅ Ignis - ✅ Ender Dragon - ✅ Netherite Monstrosity

## Mod Compatibility Errors
Jade You can set where you want to see Jade HUD by modifying Horizontal Ratio and Vertical Ratio or you can turning it off by doing the following:

**1.19.2 and older versions:** - Main Menu -> Mods -> Jade -> Config -> Jade Settings -> Display entities -> OFF **1.20.1 and new versions:** - Main Menu -> Mods -> Jade -> Config -> Mod Settings -> Display Bosses -> OFF - Main Menu -> Mods -> Jade -> Config -> Mod Settings -> Boss Bars Overlap -> Push Down Tooltip
RPG-HUD - (In game) Press Esc -> RPG-Hud -> Entity Inspector -> Show Entity Inspect: OFF (or just change the position) - (In game) Press Esc -> RPG-Hud -> Compass -> Enable Compass: OFF (or just change the position)
## Update [1.6] Well, this time I redesigned most of the boss bars, to make them more coherent between them. Here are some that I think are worth watching: ![New bars](https://i.imgur.com/VcendkR.png)
